description: Tic-tac-toe RTDB rules accept the rightful player's move and reject an out-of-turn move.
notes: Grounded in the game-rules skill workflow for RTDB (turnGuard, flip, winCheckHelper). Seeds a 3x3 game in progress where currentTurn is 'X'. Positive case: playerX writes to an empty cell and flips currentTurn to 'O'. Cheat case: playerO attempts to write before turn flip. Success = simulator accepts positive AND rejects cheat. Uses the coordinated `game-rules/simulator-accepts-positive-and-rejects-cheat` spec; falls back to `final-rules-includes/literal` for the turnGuard signal when the simulator spec is not yet wired.
prompt: Write RTDB security rules for a 3x3 tic-tac-toe game at /games/$gameId. Only the player whose mark equals currentTurn can write. The turn must flip on every move. Cells, once marked, are immutable. Use the game-rules primitives (turnGuard, flip).
